judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "5, ['Request for payment method details including bank transfer and card payment (no field for payment instructions or method type beyond yes/no flag)', 'Request for traveler documents (passport and emergency contact submission) before issuing invoice (document submission process not represented)', 'Inclusion of photography as part of activity (no subcategory for photography or multi-themed activity composition)', 'Mention of travel insurance status as already confirmed/active (template only allows travel_insurance_needed flag, not insurance status confirmation)', 'Issuance of electronic travel documents (no field for document delivery or issuance method)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "15, ['Destination recommendations for Lisbon, Prague, and Athens with country and region fields', 'Trip dates (October 15–19 and November 10–14) mapped to availability_status.requested_dates', 'Flight details including airline type (budget), class (economy), price, and baggage inclusion', 'Accommodation details including property name, type, star rating, location, price per night, and Wi-Fi inclusion', 'Activities such as Hiking Expedition, Yoga Retreat, and Street Art Tour with price, duration, guide_included, and equipment_included', 'Dining options such as Vegan Bistro with cuisine_type=local_specialty or international and price_per_person', 'Package total cost in EUR with cost_breakdown and budget_compliance=yes', 'Booking confirmation with booking_reference, payment_due_date, and package_confirmed=yes', 'Cancellation policy (partial refund) mapped to constraints_and_policies.refund_policy=partial_refund', 'Change policy (modifications allowed with €25 fee) mapped to constraints_and_policies.change_policy=fee_based_changes and booking_status.modification_fee', 'Information request for passport_details_needed=yes', 'Information request for emergency_contact_needed=yes', 'Information request for payment_method_needed=yes', 'Flight origin and destination airports and travel dates mapped to flights.departure_airport/arrival_airport and departure_time/arrival_time', 'Activity characteristics such as guide_included=yes, equipment_included=yes, and difficulty_level=moderate']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Request for payment method details including bank transfer and card payment (no field for payment instructions or method type beyond yes/no flag)', 'Request for traveler documents (passport and emergency contact submission) before issuing invoice (document submission process not represented)', 'Inclusion of photography as part of activity (no subcategory for photography or multi-themed activity composition)', 'Mention of travel insurance status as already confirmed/active (template only allows travel_insurance_needed flag, not insurance status confirmation)', 'Issuance of electronic travel documents (no field for document delivery or issuance method)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 15, ['Destination recommendations for Lisbon, Prague, and Athens with country and region fields', 'Trip dates (October 15–19 and November 10–14) mapped to availability_status.requested_dates', 'Flight details including airline type (budget), class (economy), price, and baggage inclusion', 'Accommodation details including property name, type, star rating, location, price per night, and Wi-Fi inclusion', 'Activities such as Hiking Expedition, Yoga Retreat, and Street Art Tour with price, duration, guide_included, and equipment_included', 'Dining options such as Vegan Bistro with cuisine_type=local_specialty or international and price_per_person', 'Package total cost in EUR with cost_breakdown and budget_compliance=yes', 'Booking confirmation with booking_reference, payment_due_date, and package_confirmed=yes', 'Cancellation policy (partial refund) mapped to constraints_and_policies.refund_policy=partial_refund', 'Change policy (modifications allowed with €25 fee) mapped to constraints_and_policies.change_policy=fee_based_changes and booking_status.modification_fee', 'Information request for passport_details_needed=yes', 'Information request for emergency_contact_needed=yes', 'Information request for payment_method_needed=yes', 'Flight origin and destination airports and travel dates mapped to flights.departure_airport/arrival_airport and departure_time/arrival_time', 'Activity characteristics such as guide_included=yes, equipment_included=yes, and difficulty_level=moderate']

indescribable_items: Request for payment method details including bank transfer and card payment (no field for payment instructions or method type beyond yes/no flag)
Request for traveler documents (passport and emergency contact submission) before issuing invoice (document submission process not represented)
Inclusion of photography as part of activity (no subcategory for photography or multi-themed activity composition)
Mention of travel insurance status as already confirmed/active (template only allows travel_insurance_needed flag, not insurance status confirmation)
Issuance of electronic travel documents (no field for document delivery or issuance method)
describable_items: Destination recommendations for Lisbon, Prague, and Athens with country and region fields
Trip dates (October 15–19 and November 10–14) mapped to availability_status.requested_dates
Flight details including airline type (budget), class (economy), price, and baggage inclusion
Accommodation details including property name, type, star rating, location, price per night, and Wi-Fi inclusion
Activities such as Hiking Expedition, Yoga Retreat, and Street Art Tour with price, duration, guide_included, and equipment_included
Dining options such as Vegan Bistro with cuisine_type=local_specialty or international and price_per_person
Package total cost in EUR with cost_breakdown and budget_compliance=yes
Booking confirmation with booking_reference, payment_due_date, and package_confirmed=yes
Change policy (modifications allowed with €25 fee) mapped to constraints_and_policies.change_policy=fee_based_changes and booking_status.modification_fee
Flight origin and destination airports and travel dates mapped to flights.departure_airport/arrival_airport and departure_time/arrival_time
Activity characteristics such as guide_included=yes, equipment_included=yes, and difficulty_level=moderate
